title: Vanilla-esque Decor
description: Cool blocks and more, often using vanilla textures
body:
A simple mod adding several vanilla-esque blocks for all your decoration needs. From more cobblestone variants to incredibly strong forms of iron blocks, everything you wanted, or didnt.
Due to the use of vanilla textures, this mod works with most texture/resource packs.![All of the mods blocks, from cobblestone variants to new forms of flooring.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/92fb23ba09546e8c91ee18839c1adbb2b0ce37df.png)
Currently, this mod features:
- Reinforced Cobblestone
- Reinforced Cobblestone Siding
- Framed Cobblestone
- Reinforced Iron Block
- Framed Smooth Stone
- Reinforced Oak Planks
- Oak Tiling
- Polished Deepslate Tiling
- Reinforced Stripped Mangrove
- Oak Checkerboard
- Skylight
- Reinforced Polished Deepslate Siding
- Heavily Reinforced Polished Deepslate Siding
- High Impact Iron Block
- Stacked High Impact Iron Block
- Spruce Tiling
- Black Mesa Welcome Mat
- Aperture Science Welcome Mat

Have fun, and happy decorating!
